series_metadata.series_title: International Fire Service Accreditation Congress (IFSAC) accreditation materials
series_metadata.series_description: Includes IFSAC accreditation application, test information, candidate information, IFSAC seal numbers, student scores, pass/fail notification, other certification documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy the later of five years or until IFSAC performs a site visit. ; Electronic: Retain machine readable format the later of five years or until IFSAC performs a site visit., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
